clubs.name: CSIT Club
clubs.description: The premier technical club of MITS Gwalior, focused on software development, competitive programming, and technology innovation. We organize hackathons, coding bootcamps, and workshops throughout the year.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon – Regional Winners
achievements.description: Won SIH regional round 2023 with IoT Agriculture project

achievements.title: 500+ Students Trained
achievements.description: Conducted 20+ workshops on Web Dev, ML, Cloud & DevOps

achievements.title: Google Solution Challenge – Top 100
achievements.description: Global Top 100 in GDSC Solution Challenge 2024

achievements.title: ICPC Regionals Qualifier
achievements.description: 3 teams qualified for ICPC Asia-West Regional

customSections.title: Our Mission
customSections.content: To bridge the gap between classroom learning and industry-ready skills through hands-on experience.

customSections.title: What We Offer
customSections.content: Weekly coding sessions, monthly hackathons, industry mentorship, competitive programming training, and placement prep.

customSections.title: Tech Stack
customSections.content: React, Node.js, Python, TensorFlow, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB & more.

clubs.name: Robotics Club
clubs.description: Focused on robotics, IoT and embedded systems. We build real-world automation solutions and participate in national-level competitions.

achievements.title: SIH Hardware – Winners
achievements.description: Smart irrigation system won SIH Hardware round

customSections.title: Lab & Equipment
customSections.content: 3D printers, CNC machines, Arduino/RPi kits, drone stations, and soldering workstations.

customSections.title: Active Projects
customSections.content: Autonomous delivery bot, Smart greenhouse, Line-following swarm robots, Gesture-controlled robotic arm.

clubs.name: Cultural Club
clubs.description: Celebrating the cultural diversity of MITS through music, dance, drama and literary events. We are the heartbeat of campus life.

achievements.title: Inter-College Dance Championship
achievements.description: 1st place at Techno-Cultural Fest, IIIT Bhopal

achievements.title: National Drama Competition
achievements.description: Represented MP state in National Youth Festival

customSections.title: Wings
customSections.content: Dance, Music, Drama & Theatre, Literary, Art & Design, Photography.

customSections.title: Flagship Events
customSections.content: Rangmanch, Open Mic Nights, Cultural Weekends, Flash Mobs, Heritage Walks.

clubs.name: Sports Committee
clubs.description: Organizing intra and inter-college sports events, tournaments and fitness programs. From cricket to athletics, we foster healthy competition.

achievements.title: State Athletics – 3 Gold Medals
achievements.description: Gold in 100m, Long Jump, Shot Put

customSections.title: Facilities
customSections.content: Cricket ground, Football field, Basketball & Volleyball courts, Badminton, Table Tennis, Gymnasium, 400m track.

customSections.title: Upcoming
customSections.content: Inter-branch Football League, Badminton Open, Table Tennis Championship, Annual Marathon.

events.title: CodeQuest 2024
events.description: National level coding competition with 200+ participants from across India.

events.title: RoboWars v5
events.description: Battle of the bots – design, build and fight!

events.title: Web Dev Bootcamp
events.description: Intensive 2-day full-stack bootcamp with React & Node.js.

events.title: RoboWars 2024
events.description: Build your bot and compete! Teams of 2-4.

events.title: Rangmanch – Annual Cultural Fest
events.description: 3 days of dance, music, drama & literary competitions!

events.title: Inter-College Cricket Tournament
events.description: T20 cricket – Gwalior region colleges. Winner gets MITS Trophy!

events.title: AI/ML Workshop
events.description: Hands-on ML with Python, scikit-learn & TensorFlow.

events.title: Cybersecurity Awareness Workshop
events.description: Ethical hacking, penetration testing & CTF challenges!

events.title: IoT Bootcamp – Smart Campus
events.description: Build IoT solutions with Arduino, ESP32 & RPi.

events.title: Poetry Slam – Open Mic Night
events.description: Poetry, spoken word, and storytelling. Refreshments included!

events.title: Yoga & Fitness Camp
events.description: Week-long morning yoga & fitness led by certified trainers.

events.title: Open Source Contribution Day
events.description: Learn Git, GitHub & make your first PR!

events.title: Photography Walk – Heritage Gwalior
events.description: Capture Gwalior Fort & Jai Vilas Palace. Best photos exhibited!

logs.action: System initialized. CCMS demo mode activated.
Aryan Sharma appointed as President of CSIT Club.
Registered for Web Dev Bootcamp — Pending Payment.
20+ institutional identities seeded into the ledger.
Recruitment cycle 2024-Spring opened for Robotics Club.
Certificate batch for CodeQuest 2024 approved by Dean.
Poetry Slam event created and submitted for approval.
Registered for Cybersecurity Workshop — Ticket Issued.

activities.title: Git & GitHub Workshop
activities.description: Introductory session on version control, branching strategies, and collaborative development using GitHub.
activities.outcome: 45 students attended, 30 made their first PR

activities.title: Competitive Programming Contest
activities.description: Monthly CP contest on Codeforces-style problems. Prizes for top 3 performers.
activities.outcome: 60 participants, 3 winners awarded certificates

activities.title: Arduino Basics Session
activities.description: Hands-on introduction to Arduino Uno, sensors, and basic circuit design.
activities.outcome: All 25 participants built their first LED circuit

activities.title: Drone Assembly Workshop
activities.description: Two-day intensive workshop on building and flying quadcopter drones.
activities.outcome: 3 drones assembled and test-flown successfully

activities.title: Open Mic Night Vol. 3
activities.description: Monthly open mic featuring poetry, standup comedy, and musical performances.
activities.outcome: 12 performers, 150+ audience

activities.title: Classical Dance Workshop
activities.description: Workshop on Kathak fundamentals by guest artist from Gwalior Gharana.
activities.outcome: 30 students learned basic Kathak movements

activities.title: Intra-Branch Football League – Round 1
activities.description: First round matches of inter-branch football tournament.
activities.outcome: CS, ME, EC, CE qualified for next round

activities.title: Morning Fitness Challenge
activities.description: 30-day morning fitness challenge with daily exercises and tracking.
activities.outcome: 50 students completed the full 30-day challenge

activities.title: DSA Study Group – Week 4
activities.description: Weekly DSA study group covering Trees and Graphs. Practice problems included.
activities.outcome: 35 students solved 10 problems on LeetCode

activities.title: Cloud Computing Webinar
activities.description: Guest webinar by AWS Solution Architect on cloud fundamentals and career paths.
activities.outcome: 85 students attended, 10 signed up for AWS Academy

activities.title: React Advanced Concepts
activities.description: Deep dive into React Hooks, Context API, and performance optimization. Intermediate level workshop.
activities.outcome: 40 students completed all exercises. 8 student-led projects initiated.

activities.title: LeetCode Contest #5
activities.description: Monthly competitive programming contest on LeetCode. Hard level problems. Top 3 get Amazon vouchers.
activities.outcome: 95 participants, 3 perfect scores, $150 in prizes distributed

activities.title: PCB Design Workshop
activities.description: Two-day intensive on circuit design, PCB layout & manufacturing. Hands-on with Altium Designer.
activities.outcome: 3 PCBs designed and ordered for manufacturing

activities.title: Drone Racing Championship
activities.description: First inter-college drone racing event. 5 teams competing. Prize pool ₹20K.
activities.outcome: MITS Robotics won 1st place. 300+ spectators attended.

activities.title: Music Production Workshop
activities.description: Introduction to music production using FL Studio and Ableton Live. Recording & mixing basics.
activities.outcome: 22 students completed. 2 students produced original tracks.

activities.title: Stand-up Comedy Night
activities.description: Monthly stand-up comedy event. Featuring student comedians and some external performers.
activities.outcome: 250+ audience, 8 performers. Highly appreciated event.

activities.title: Badminton League – Group Stage
activities.description: Inter-branch singles and doubles tournament. Best-of-3 matches.
activities.outcome: CS, ME, CE qualified for semifinals. 80 students participated.

activities.title: Nutrition & Fitness Seminar
activities.description: Ft. Sports Nutritionist and Olympic trainer. Panel discussion on health & fitness.
activities.outcome: 400+ students attended. 50+ nutrition consultations done.

activities.title: Database Design Deep Dive
activities.description: SQL optimization, query performance, indexing strategies. Companies hiring track.
activities.outcome: 35 students. 5 participants got internship offers from TechCorp.

activities.title: Green Robotics Hackathon
activities.description: Build eco-friendly robots. Theme: Sustainability. 6-hour challenge.
activities.outcome: 10 teams, 3 prizes. Winning bot: Solar-powered sweeper.

messages.content: Hey everyone! HackMITS registrations are now open. Spread the word! 🚀
Amazing! I will share it with all the juniors. Can we also post it on the notice board?
The ML workshop prep is going great. I have the slides ready for review.
RoboWars arena setup is complete! Testing starts tomorrow. 🤖
The new ESP32 modules have arrived. IoT bootcamp prep looking good!
Rangmanch rehearsals start next week. All wing leads please confirm your schedules.
Dance wing is ready! We have 15 performers confirmed for the opening act. 💃
Great work on the workshop Pooja! The participation was amazing.
Excellent execution of the bootcamp this year. Keep up the momentum!
